videos.title: They fit so nicely...#atlas #transfercase #jeep
I Took My Jeep Into Billy the Kid's Hometown
videos.description: This Recon America episode takes me to southwest New Mexico for two days of exploring on and off the trail. The first day runs the Saddle Rock Canyon and T-Bar T trails deep in the Gila National Forest, with old mineshafts, ranch land, and high country that climbs to over six thousand feet. The second day is spent walking the historic streets of Silver City, the country that produced Billy the Kid, survived a flood that erased its Main Street, and kept reinventing itself when most of its mining

Power BI now has a new modern design look with the Fluent 2 base theme (Preview)!

That means your report visuals now start with a modern, consistent look automatically: grey canvas, better spacing, rounded corners, dropdown slicers, style presets, and a wider default page size for new pages.

Power Apps.feature_name: Enforce the modern, refreshed look in model-driven apps
Power Apps.description: Making the modern look universal gives you a consistent, accessible, and modern experience. Organizations benefit from simplified governance, reduced support overhead, and reliable rollout of UX improvements across environments, freeing admins and makers to focus on solutions rather than maintaining UI exceptions.

Power Automate.enabled_for: Admins, makers, marketers, or analysts, automatically
Power Automate.description: The enhanced licensing feature enables centralized visibility for administrators, cost optimization through better understanding of license and capacity utilization, and proactive management of licenses based on usage patterns.

Power Automate.enabled_for: Admins, makers, marketers, or analysts, automatically
Power Automate.description: With the introduction of the ability to restore accidentally deleted flows directly from the portal, organizations gain a powerful tool to maintain business continuity and minimize operational disruptions. This feature allows flow owners, co-owners, and environment administrators to recover deleted flows quickly and easily within a set timeframe. This recovery process eliminates the need to contact customer support for assistance. As a result, your teams can save valuable time, reduce downtime,

Microsoft Dataverse.feature_name: Build your agentic flows with Dataverse SDK for Python
Microsoft Dataverse.product_group: Build your low code hyperscale backend on Dataverse
Microsoft Dataverse.enabled_for: Admins, makers, marketers, or analysts, automatically
Microsoft Dataverse.description: Enables data scientists and developers to create, access, and manage Dataverse business data using Python programming. The Dataverse SDK for Python implements common Python programming paradigms and best practices, provides a more natural Python interface to Dataverse, and supports community contributions.

Microsoft Dataverse.feature_name: Restore deleted records within a specified timeframe
Microsoft Dataverse.product_group: Improved enterprise experiences in Power Platform
Microsoft Dataverse.enabled_for: Admins, makers, marketers, or analysts, automatically
Microsoft Dataverse.description: The restore deleted records feature in Microsoft Dataverse provides a safety net for accidental or bulk deletions by enabling easy recovery of records within a configurable retention period. It reduces data loss risk, saves time and costs associated with complex restores, and boosts user confidence, all while giving admins full control over enablement and governance.

Microsoft Power Platform governance and.feature_name: GitHub support for source code integration in Power Platform
Microsoft Power Platform governance and.product: Microsoft Power Platform governance and administration
Microsoft Power Platform governance and.enabled_for: Admins, makers, marketers, or analysts, automatically
Microsoft Power Platform governance and.description: The source control integration functionality is available natively within the solutions experiences, ensuring citizen developers, code-first developers, and administrators can benefit from version control, change tracking, and seamless team collaboration across different tools and environments.

Microsoft Power Platform governance and.feature_name: Detect operational health issues across Power Platform resources quickly
Microsoft Power Platform governance and.product: Microsoft Power Platform governance and administration
Microsoft Power Platform governance and.enabled_for: Admins, makers, marketers, or analysts, automatically
Microsoft Power Platform governance and.description: This feature enables organizations to detect operational health issues across Power Platform resources quickly, which reduces downtime and the cost of disrupted business processes. Not only can alerts be configured to run reliably every 24 hours, but users have the ability to configure them with a 1‑hour evaluation frequency. This helps teams catch degradations early, minimizing the need for manual monitoring or engineering intervention. By preventing issues from escalating, businesses save time
